description: VERIFIED LIVE: Kingsoft Docs (金山文档) via your logged-in session (session bridge — no token). Your profile and your recent/roaming files work cookie-only on the drive.kdocs.cn API. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in session: userinfo and roaming(recent) both returned real data.

tools.name: kdocs_userinfo
tools.description: Your Kdocs account profile (id, name, avatar, vip). VERIFIED.

tools.name: kdocs_recent_files
tools.description: Your recently opened / roaming files (name, fileid, modify time). VERIFIED.
